0. 研究与执行原则（每次新会话首先阅读） / 0.1 当前执行门禁

registry_change_assertions.reason: Freeze the implemented Near-Retention protocol and preserve the gated successor sequence.
Freeze the implemented Near-Retention protocol and preserve the gated successor sequence.

registry_change_assertions.from: Under a shared C-U1 geometry and matched average near-negative retention, test whether reciprocal-quadratic or a vanishing-tail family reduces far harmful influence more efficiently than reciprocal-linear without merely deleting more locally useful negative signal.
registry_change_assertions.reason: Freeze the implemented Near-Retention protocol and preserve the gated successor sequence.
registry_change_assertions.to: Under the shared C-U1 geometry and matched pooled average retention over the preregistered near region, test whether taper shape changes useful-near preservation, harmful-far influence, full-parameter far/near gradient allocation, and held-out-context task behavior. Reward superiority and a universal family winner are not assumed.
